article_title: HttpClient 弹性策略：.NET 10 中的超时、重试与断路器
core_theme: 用 Microsoft.Extensions.Http.Resilience 给 HttpClient 加上四层弹性管道：超时、重试带抖动、断路器和分层超时
reader_takeaway: 学会一行 AddStandardResilienceHandler 或自定义 AddResilienceHandler 构建生产级 HTTP 弹性层
summary_angle: 从手写 Polly 样板代码到声明式弹性管道的简化路径

information_blocks.source_anchor: 原文「Old Way」：手写 Polly Policy 链、版本耦合、无遥测
information_blocks.visual_idea: 左侧凌乱的 Policy.WrapAsync 嵌套

information_blocks.source_anchor: 原文管道结构：4 层策略（超时→重试→断路器→尝试超时）
information_blocks.visual_idea: 中央四层堆叠的防护管道

information_blocks.source_anchor: 原文重试 vs 对冲的对比：顺序 vs 并行投机请求
information_blocks.visual_idea: 右侧两条分叉路径：顺序重试（时间线）和对冲（并行请求）

information_blocks.source_anchor: 原文总结：decision guide 和可观测性
information_blocks.visible_idea: 仪表盘上显示断路器状态和重试指标

main_metaphor: 多层防护盾：外层总超时 → 重试缓冲区 → 断路器熔断 → 每次尝试超时
primary_subject: 一个四层防护管道结构，HTTP 请求穿过超时、重试、断路器和尝试超时
subject_action: 请求正穿过弹性防护管道，各层各司其职
composition: 自外而内的防护层次结构：总超时 → 重试 → 断路器 → 尝试超时
selected_style_prompt_descriptor: ornate fantasy fashion illustration, lace-like detail, dollhouse elegance, soft magical palette, controlled decorative density
selected_style_reason: 用户未指定风格，从 40 项风格池随机选中（#27）；精致层叠的装饰风格适合表达多层防护管道逐层过滤的结构美感
style_safety_note: 清单风格为泛类型描述，不涉及品牌、工作室或艺术家复刻
draft_goal: 验证四层管道的外到内结构是否清晰
revision_targets: 洛丽塔风格与技术主题的平衡
final_prompt:
Use case: infographic-story
Asset type: wide cover infographic illustration for a Chinese tech blog article
Primary request: Create a wide infographic-story cover illustration. Theme: HttpClient resilience pipeline with timeout, retry with jitter, circuit breaker, and attempt timeout. Summary angle: From hand-written Polly boilerplate to declarative 4-layer resilience pipeline. Narrative flow: before-after. Information blocks: Problem — messy Polly policy wrapping on the left. Mechanism — central 4-layer protection pipeline (total timeout → retry → circuit breaker → attempt timeout). Contrast — two paths on the right: sequential retry timeline and parallel hedging requests. Takeaway — observable dashboard with metrics. Main metaphor: A multi-layer protection shield filtering HTTP requests through timeout, retry, circuit breaker, and attempt timeout layers. Subject: A 4-layer protective pipeline structure. Composition: Outer-to-inner layers: total timeout → retry → circuit breaker → attempt timeout. Style/medium: combine editorial technical illustration with ornate fantasy fashion illustration, lace-like detail, dollhouse elegance, soft magical palette, controlled decorative density. Do not imitate a specific brand, studio, or living artist. Color palette: soft violet, pale gold, cream white, light rose. No poster title, no fake UI, no fake terminals.
